notes: Registry BUILD is wrong — this is OPERATIONS. Session drives desired state on three macOS machines (M4 Mac Pro, M4 Mac Mini, M2 Mac) via Ansible playbooks. Tool pattern: Read x14, Edit x14, Task x10, Glob x2. Read/Edit symmetry (both 35%) signals config-authoring with verify cycle, not greenfield development. Task-heavy (25%) reflects subagent shell orchestration. 9 user prompts across 3 active phases (~33 min + ~12 min), separated by ~6.5h overnight gap. Final phase includes aborted ansible-playbook run (User interrupted execution). Subtype candidate: operations.mac_provisioning. Key classifier signal: cwd in agent-os/ansible + playbook edits + ansible-playbook terminal output = OPERATIONS, not BUILD.
